message:
fix(install): harden Agent Mail systemd unit against unescaped values

The Agent Mail systemd unit file emitted by install.sh interpolated
$storage_root, $db_url, $am_bin, and $am_mcp_path directly into
Environment=, ExecStartPre=, ExecStart=, and WorkingDirectory= lines.
Any of those values containing a space, percent sign, dollar sign,
backslash, double quote, or tab would produce a malformed unit (or in
the worst case allow a path that looks like a shell value to alter
substitution downstream).

Add a small set of helpers near the unit emit site:

- systemd_unit_reject_line_breaks: reject CR/LF (no escape exists for
  these in unit files; better to fail than write a broken unit).
- systemd_unit_path_escape: escape backslash, percent, space, and tab
  for path-style settings (WorkingDirectory).
- systemd_unit_quote: emit a properly quoted "..." literal with
  backslash, double-quote, and percent escaped, with optional dollar
  doubling for Environment= where systemd performs $$-expansion.
- systemd_unit_exec_arg / systemd_unit_exec_command: thin wrappers
  that pick the right escape_dollar policy for ExecStart= tokens.
- systemd_unit_env_assignment: validate the variable NAME against
  [A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]* and quote NAME=VALUE as a single literal.

Use the helpers to derive storage_root_unit, rust_log_env,
storage_root_env, database_url_env, http_allow_env, am_bin_exec, and
am_mcp_path_exec, then reference those in the heredoc instead of the
raw shell variables. Failures bubble up through `|| exit 1` so the
installer aborts cleanly on bad input rather than writing a half-
escaped unit.

Add a regression test in tests/unit/lib/test_update.bats that asserts:

- the helpers are present in install.sh
- the unit no longer emits the raw `$storage_root`, `$am_bin`, or
  `STORAGE_ROOT=$storage_root` forms
- the unit DOES emit the escaped `$storage_root_unit`,
  `$storage_root_env`, and `${am_bin_exec}` forms

This pins the escaping in place so future edits to the unit emit site
fail loudly instead of silently regressing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -6121,21 +6121,66 @@ PY
                         else
                             am_mcp_path="/api/"
                         fi
+                        systemd_unit_reject_line_breaks() {
+                            local value="${1:-}"
+                            [[ "$value" != *$'\''\n'\''* && "$value" != *$'\''\r'\''* ]]
+                        }
+                        systemd_unit_path_escape() {
+                            local value="${1:-}"
+                            local tab=$'\''\t'\''
+                            systemd_unit_reject_line_breaks "$value" || return 1
+                            value="${value//\\/\\\\}"
+                            value="${value//%/%%}"
+                            value="${value// /\\s}"
+                            value="${value//$tab/\\t}"
+                            printf "%s\n" "$value"
+                        }
+                        systemd_unit_quote() {
+                            local value="${1:-}"
+                            local escape_dollar="${2:-false}"
+                            systemd_unit_reject_line_breaks "$value" || return 1
+                            value="${value//\\/\\\\}"
+                            value="${value//\"/\\\"}"
+                            value="${value//%/%%}"
+                            if [[ "$escape_dollar" == "true" ]]; then
+                                value="${value//\$/\$\$}"
+                            fi
+                            printf "\"%s\"\n" "$value"
+                        }
+                        systemd_unit_exec_arg() {
+                            systemd_unit_quote "${1:-}" true
+                        }
+                        systemd_unit_exec_command() {
+                            systemd_unit_quote "${1:-}" false
+                        }
+                        systemd_unit_env_assignment() {
+                            local name="${1:-}"
+                            local value="${2:-}"
+                            [[ "$name" =~ ^[A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*$ ]] || return 1
+                            systemd_unit_quote "${name}=${value}" false
+                        }
                         mkdir -p "$storage_root" "$unit_dir"
+                        storage_root_unit="$(systemd_unit_path_escape "$storage_root")" || exit 1
+                        rust_log_env="$(systemd_unit_env_assignment RUST_LOG info)" || exit 1
+                        storage_root_env="$(systemd_unit_env_assignment STORAGE_ROOT "$storage_root")" || exit 1
+                        database_url_env="$(systemd_unit_env_assignment DATABASE_URL "$db_url")" || exit 1
+                        http_allow_env="$(systemd_unit_env_assignment HTTP_ALLOW_LOCALHOST_UNAUTHENTICATED true)" || exit 1
+                        am_bin_exec="$(systemd_unit_exec_command "$am_bin")" || exit 1
+                        am_mcp_path_exec="$(systemd_unit_exec_arg "$am_mcp_path")" || exit 1
                         cat > "$unit_file" <<UNIT_EOF
 [Unit]
 Description=MCP Agent Mail Server
 After=network.target
 
 [Service]
 Type=simple
-WorkingDirectory=$storage_root
-Environment=RUST_LOG=info
-Environment=STORAGE_ROOT=$storage_root
-Environment=DATABASE_URL=$db_url
-Environment=HTTP_ALLOW_LOCALHOST_UNAUTHENTICATED=true
-ExecStartPre=$am_bin migrate
-ExecStart=$am_bin serve-http --no-tui --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8765 --path $am_mcp_path
+WorkingDirectory=$storage_root_unit
+Environment=$rust_log_env
+Environment=$storage_root_env
+Environment=$database_url_env
+Environment=$http_allow_env
+ExecStartPre=${am_bin_exec} migrate
+ExecStart=${am_bin_exec} serve-http --no-tui --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8765 --path ${am_mcp_path_exec}
 Restart=always
 RestartSec=5
 LimitNOFILE=65536

@@ -7946,6 +7946,37 @@ SECURITY
     assert_success
 }
 
+@test "install.sh Agent Mail unit escapes dynamic systemd values" {
+    local installer="$PROJECT_ROOT/install.sh"
+
+    run grep -F 'systemd_unit_path_escape() {' "$installer"
+    assert_success
+
+    run grep -F 'value="${value//%/%%}"' "$installer"
+    assert_success
+
+    run grep -F 'value="${value//\$/\$\$}"' "$installer"
+    assert_success
+
+    run grep -Fx 'WorkingDirectory=$storage_root' "$installer"
+    assert_failure
+
+    run grep -Fx 'WorkingDirectory=$storage_root_unit' "$installer"
+    assert_success
+
+    run grep -Fx 'Environment=STORAGE_ROOT=$storage_root' "$installer"
+    assert_failure
+
+    run grep -Fx 'Environment=$storage_root_env' "$installer"
+    assert_success
+
+    run grep -F 'ExecStart=$am_bin serve-http' "$installer"
+    assert_failure
+
+    run grep -F 'ExecStart=${am_bin_exec} serve-http' "$installer"
+    assert_success
+}
+
 @test "stack Agent Mail service accepts a healthy existing runtime" {
     local stack_lib="$PROJECT_ROOT/scripts/lib/stack.sh"
